title: AWS provider extension refinement (extensions.aws)
description: Validates the content of a document's extensions.aws block. Refinements are advisory provider settings only: they never carry intent, and per chapter 11 they can never weaken a core intent floor without a validation error.

version.description: Extension package version registered at document level.

resources.description: Per-resource AWS refinements, keyed by resource identifier.

backupWindow.description: Daily backup window for Database resources (UTC, hh:mm-hh:mm).

instanceClassHint.description: Concrete instance-class override hint for Database or Cache resources (e.g. db.r7g.large, cache.m7g.large). A hint may exceed the size the mapping derives, never reduce a declared capability.

tags.description: Additional AWS resource tags applied to every provider resource realized from this document resource.
